name: @brika/plugin-agent
description: Run Claude inside your workflows: prompt-in, text-out AI blocks
author: BRIKA Team

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.label: Anthropic API Key
preferences.description: Your Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Set once here; used by every agent block and tool. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

blocks.name: Ask Claude
blocks.description: Send a prompt to Claude and emit the completion

blocks.name: Call Tool
blocks.description: Invoke a hub-registered tool by id and emit its result

blocks.name: AI Agent
blocks.description: Claude agent that reasons and calls tools to answer each prompt
